Video.summary: Contemplate the dynamic civilizations that emerged in the Aegean.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Great Tours: Greece and Turkey, from Athens to Istanbul
Video.title: Touring the Cradle of Western Civilization

Image.alt: Touring the Cradle of Western Civilization
Touring the Cradle of Western Civilization

Video.summary: Investigate the history and meanings of iconic buildings in the Acropolis.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Great Tours: Greece and Turkey, from Athens to Istanbul
Video.title: Athens - Around the Acropolis and Parthenon

Image.alt: Athens - Around the Acropolis and Parthenon
Athens - Around the Acropolis and Parthenon
Athens - Around the Acropolis and Parthenon

Video.summary: Discover the Theater of Dionysus and the grand Odeon of Herodes Atticus.

Video.title: In the Footsteps of Socrates - Historic Athens

Image.alt: In the Footsteps of Socrates - Historic Athens
In the Footsteps of Socrates - Historic Athens
In the Footsteps of Socrates - Historic Athens

Video.summary: This lesson takes you to the sacred monuments of Greece's beautiful Attica region.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Great Tours: Greece and Turkey, from Athens to Istanbul
Video.title: Around Attica - Temples and Mysteries

Image.alt: Around Attica - Temples and Mysteries
Around Attica - Temples and Mysteries
Around Attica - Temples and Mysteries

Video.summary: Your journey continues to the Peloponnese, Greece's southern half.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Great Tours: Greece and Turkey, from Athens to Istanbul
Video.title: Seeking the Good Life - Corinth to Epidauros

Image.alt: Seeking the Good Life - Corinth to Epidauros
Seeking the Good Life - Corinth to Epidauros
Seeking the Good Life - Corinth to Epidauros

Video.summary: Visit the great citadel of Mycenae, made famous in Homer's "Iliad".
Video.grandparentTitle: The Great Tours: Greece and Turkey, from Athens to Istanbul
Video.title: Mycenae - Where Kings Planned the Trojan War

Image.alt: Mycenae - Where Kings Planned the Trojan War
Mycenae - Where Kings Planned the Trojan War
Mycenae - Where Kings Planned the Trojan War

Video.summary: In Greece's Argolid region, walk the fortress of Tiryns, and learn of Mycenaean warrior culture.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Great Tours: Greece and Turkey, from Athens to Istanbul
Video.title: Around Nafplio - Greek History at a Glance

Image.alt: Around Nafplio - Greek History at a Glance
Around Nafplio - Greek History at a Glance

Video.summary: Investigate the practices and culture of the original Olympic games.

Image.alt: Ancient Olympia - Gods, Games, and Temples
Ancient Olympia - Gods, Games, and Temples

Video.summary: How did the American West come into being, and how was it shaped by myth?
Video.grandparentTitle: The American West: History, Myth, and Legacy
Video.title: Westward the Course of Empire

Image.alt: Westward the Course of Empire
Westward the Course of Empire
Westward the Course of Empire

Video.summary: To understand the American West, you have to understand the mark left by its earliest colonists.
Video.grandparentTitle: The American West: History, Myth, and Legacy
Video.title: The West in the Colonial Era

Image.alt: The West in the Colonial Era
The West in the Colonial Era
The West in the Colonial Era

Video.summary: After the Revolutionary War, how was land between the Appalachians and the Mississippi organized?
Video.grandparentTitle: The American West: History, Myth, and Legacy
Video.title: Venturing beyond the Appalachians

Image.alt: Venturing beyond the Appalachians
Venturing beyond the Appalachians
Venturing beyond the Appalachians

Video.summary: Follow the fascinating journey of the two explorers who mapped the Louisiana Purchase.
Video.grandparentTitle: The American West: History, Myth, and Legacy
Video.title: Discoveries of Lewis and Clark

Image.alt: Discoveries of Lewis and Clark
Discoveries of Lewis and Clark

Video.summary: Begin the story of life on Earth with an overview of the unifying idea that will govern your exploration.
Video.grandparentTitle: A New History of Life
Video.title: The Interconnected Earth

Image.alt: The Interconnected Earth
The Interconnected Earth
The Interconnected Earth

Video.summary: Survey observations that led to the concept of deep time and tools that can read the story in rocks.
Video.grandparentTitle: A New History of Life
Video.title: The Vast Depths of Earth Time

Image.alt: The Vast Depths of Earth Time
The Vast Depths of Earth Time
The Vast Depths of Earth Time

Video.summary: In this episode, delve into biostratigraphy, the study of fossil sequences in rock strata.
Video.grandparentTitle: A New History of Life
Video.title: Fossil Clocks

Image.alt: Fossil Clocks
Fossil Clocks
Fossil Clocks

Video.summary: Learn how paleontologists interpret fossils to reconstruct the traits and environments of extinct life forms.
Video.grandparentTitle: A New History of Life
Video.title: Paleontologists as Detectives

Image.alt: Paleontologists as Detectives
Paleontologists as Detectives
Paleontologists as Detectives

Video.summary: Examine how immense wealth and privilege'for some'left its imprint on the city and its history
Video.grandparentTitle: Notorious London: A City Tour
Video.title: Oscar Wilde's Decadent London

Image.alt: Oscar Wilde's Decadent London
Oscar Wilde's Decadent London
Oscar Wilde's Decadent London

Video.summary: Uncover the history of a church that has been so much more than a place of worship for the people of London
Video.grandparentTitle: Notorious London: A City Tour
Video.title: St. Paul's Cathedral in Faith, Fire, and Sin

Image.alt: St. Paul's Cathedral in Faith, Fire, and Sin
St. Paul's Cathedral in Faith, Fire, and Sin

Video.summary: Go back in time to an evening in March of 1941, when the Caf' de Paris was destroyed in the Blitz.
Video.grandparentTitle: Notorious London: A City Tour
Video.title: Getting Blitzed at London's Café de Paris

Image.alt: Getting Blitzed at London's Café de Paris
Getting Blitzed at London's Café de Paris

Video.summary: Look back on the history of a three-block stretch of city street and see why it became such a magnet.
Video.grandparentTitle: Notorious London: A City Tour
Video.title: On Carnaby Street during the Swinging '60s

Image.alt: On Carnaby Street during the Swinging '60s
On Carnaby Street during the Swinging '60s

Video.summary: Dive into the history of the Tower of London's many roles: fortress; royal residence; and prison.

A History of Infamy in the Tower of London

Video.summary: The history of religious persecution in London, from the pro-Catholic Mary I to her Protestant successors.

Video.title: Underground Catholics of Protestant London

Image.alt: Underground Catholics of Protestant London
Underground Catholics of Protestant London
Underground Catholics of Protestant London

Video.summary: Experience some of the scandalous stories of sex and danger that abounded the 18th-century public place.
Video.grandparentTitle: Notorious London: A City Tour
Video.title: Wicked Fun at the Vauxhall Pleasure Gardens

Image.alt: Wicked Fun at the Vauxhall Pleasure Gardens
Wicked Fun at the Vauxhall Pleasure Gardens
